name: Industry Analysts Discuss Benefits of Intel Anti-Theft Technology (YouTube/channelintel)
description: Intel's channelintel YouTube channel hosts a 2008-era promotional video featuring industry analysts (Peter Kastner among the named tags) discussing Intel Anti-Theft Technology as an important milestone for notebook PC theft deterrence. The webarchive captures only the page metadata, description, and tag list; the video content itself is not in the saved page text. Importance is documentary — it establishes Kastner as an Intel-recognized analyst voice on Centrino 2 vPro / AT-d circa 2008.
